basic_details.job_title: BHU Junior Research Assistantship Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Banaras Hindu University is recruiting 01 JRA under CST-UP funded project for a period of 2 years 3 months.

age_limit.age_details: Council of Science and Technology, Uttar Pradesh (CST-UP)

qualification.details: criteria: Details | age limit: Maximum 28 years as on 1st April 2025 (Age relaxation as per GOI rules). | other requirements: Candidate should be a resident of Uttar Pradesh. UGC-NET/GATE/CSIR-NET qualified candidates with research experience in Plant-microbe interactions, biofertilizers, PGPR, biocomposting, biostimulants and sustainable agriculture will be preferred.
qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Biotechnology / Microbiology / Life Science / Agriculture / Environmental Sciences with first class academic record in graduation and post-graduation.

how_to_apply: Interested candidates may send their written application along with detailed CV, self-attested copies of all mark-sheets & certificates through **post (hard copy)** and also by **email** to [email protected] and [email protected] within 15 days of this advertisement. No TA/DA will be paid if called for interview.
important_instructions: The post is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. Only shortlisted candidates will be called for interview. Candidates must have first class academic record throughout.

content_sections.heading: BHU Junior Research Assistantship Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: Banaras Hindu University is recruiting 01 JRA under CST-UP funded project for a period of 2 years 3 months.

rows.banaras_hindu_university_bhu_varanasi: Bioprospecting fast decomposer and plant growth promoting microorganisms to develop organic rich bio-fortified compost cum biofertilizers for enhancing sustainable vegetable production
Council of Science and Technology, Uttar Pradesh (CST-UP)
Rs. 25,000/- per month (1st & 2nd Year) Rs. 28,000/- per month (3rd Year)
2 Years 3 Months (temporary and co-terminus with the project)

rows.details: M.Sc. in Biotechnology / Microbiology / Life Science / Agriculture / Environmental Sciences with first class academic record in graduation and post-graduation.
Maximum 28 years as on 1st April 2025 (Age relaxation as per GOI rules).

Candidate should be a resident of Uttar Pradesh. UGC-NET/GATE/CSIR-NET qualified candidates with research experience in Plant-microbe interactions, biofertilizers, PGPR, biocomposting, biostimulants and sustainable agriculture will be preferred.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: The post is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. Only shortlisted candidates will be called for interview. Candidates must have first class academic record throughout.

content_sections.heading: BHU JRA Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is BHU JRA Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Banaras Hindu University has invited applications for one Junior Research Assistantship (JRA) position under CST-UP sponsored project focused on developing organic rich bio-fortified compost and biofertilizers for sustainable vegetable production.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for BHU Junior Research Assistantship 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must submit their application within 15 days from the date of advertisement (07.07.2026) through post and email.

faq.question: Q3. What is the fellowship amount for JRA at BHU?
faq.answer: The fellowship is Rs. 25,000/- per month (fixed) for the first and second year and Rs. 28,000/- per month for the third year.

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility for BHU JRA position?
faq.answer: Candidates must have M.Sc. in Biotechnology, Microbiology, Life Science, Agriculture or Environmental Sciences with first class marks. The candidate should be a resident of Uttar Pradesh and preferably UGC-NET/GATE/CSIR-NET qualified.

faq.question: Q5. Who is the Principal Investigator for this CST-UP project at BHU?
faq.answer: Dr. Jay Prakash Verma, Associate Professor, Institute of Environment and Sustainable Development (IESD), Banaras Hindu University, Varanasi.

faq.question: Q6. Is NET/GATE qualification mandatory for BHU JRA 2026?
faq.answer: No, it is not mandatory but candidates qualified in UGC-NET, GATE or CSIR-NET with relevant research experience will be given preference.

faq.question: Q7. How to apply for BHU JRA under CST-UP project?
faq.answer: Interested candidates should send their application with detailed CV and self-attested documents by post as well as email to [email protected] and [email protected] within 15 days.

faq.question: Q8. What is the project duration and location for BHU JRA?
faq.answer: The project duration is 2 years 3 months and the place of work is Institute of Environment and Sustainable Development, Banaras Hindu University, Varanasi.
